case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. EVAMARIE U. PEPIN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033 (B) (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION REDUCTION IN FILING FEES PER (B/P) CODE SECTION 6322.1 (C)(1) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

DECLARATION RE: 1. REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT 2. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS 3. INTEREST 4. WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
